citations: [High Source Strength of Most Blister Packs Delivered for 125I Seed Brachytherapy: A Case Report.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41080395/)

evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 41080395. 2025/09/10 00:00. Since the beginning of 125I seed brachytherapy, our facility has verified the 
source strength of all blister packs delivered. We set a reference range based 
on
evidence.source_title: High Source Strength of Most Blister Packs Delivered for 125I Seed Brachytherapy: A Case Report.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 41080395. 2025/09/10 00:00. Since the beginning of 125I seed brachytherapy, our facility has verified the 
source strength of all blister packs delivered. We set a reference range based 
on measurements taken with a well-type ionization chamber. There are scattered 
reports on verification for the purpose of detecting dead seeds, but to our 
knowledge, there are no reports on the application of source strength 
verification results in actual clinical practice for deviations of a few p
